page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8i.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.g8i server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor running at a baseline frequency of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 12 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyper-threading. It is provisioned with 48.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include any local storage, requiring the attachment of external cloud storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The instance does not feature any GPU acceleration, making it reliant entirely on its Intel Xeon processor for computational tasks.

Given its balanced resource allocation and dedicated CPU cores, the ecs.g8i.3xlarge is designed for general-purpose enterprise workloads. It is suitable for application servers, web serving, and database hosting when paired with external storage. The dedicated core configuration offers predictable performance, making it a cost-efficient choice for production environments that require stable CPU performance without the resource contention associated with shared-core or burstable instances.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8i.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance within the ecs.g8i family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8475B processor operating at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 12 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, providing predictable, non-shared CPU performance. The instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It includes no local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage solutions and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance is designed for enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads requiring stable, dedicated compute resources.
